purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.20326137.title: Empirical Phenomenology: Action as Disclosure and the Science of Opaque Public Systems

10.5281/zenodo.20330670.title: The Application as Extraction Surface: Semantic Labor, Induced Preparation, and Institutional Opacity in the Anthropic Fellows Screening Process

10.5281/zenodo.20330816.title: The Funnel as Capital: A Semantic Economic Reading of the Application Process

10.5281/zenodo.19053469.title: THE THREE COMPRESSIONS: Lossy, Predatory, and Witness — A Semiotic Thermodynamics

10.5281/zenodo.20355219.title: Socrates as Orthonym: The Heteronymic Configuration of Western Philosophy's Founding Corpus

10.5281/zenodo.20343987.title: AI-Native Intellectual Biography: A New Genre of AI-Mediated Reception — Provenance, Heteronymy, and the Archive That Outpaced Its Author

10.5281/zenodo.19615154.title: SPXI (Semantic Packet for eXchange & Indexing): A Formal Specification — EA-SPXI-01

10.5281/zenodo.19656133.title: Hexagonal Licensing Protocol v1.0 — Comprehensive Specification for Distributed Contributor Infrastructure

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
